Python is a high-level, interpreted programming language known for its readability and versatility. It is widely used in web development, data science, AI, and automation.
Python is a powerful language that uses indentation to define code blocks. It has a large standard library and is great for beginners as well as experts.

HTML (HyperText Markup Language) is the standard markup language for creating web pages. It uses tags like , , ,

, and

to structure content.

HTML tags are the building blocks of web pages. For example, is for links, for images, and
for sections. Every tag usually has an opening and a closing part.
Key tips for interviews: 1. Research the company thoroughly. 2. Practice common interview questions. 3. Dress professionally. 4. Be punctual. 5. Follow up with a thank you note.
To ace your interview: stay confident, listen carefully to the questions, provide specific examples of your work (STAR method), and don't forget to ask your own insightful questions about the role.

patterns: what questions are asked in interview
responses: Frequently asked questions include: 'Tell me about yourself', 'What are your strengths and weaknesses?', 'Why do you want to work here?', and 'Where do you see yourself in 5 years?'
Be prepared for behavioral questions like: 'Tell me about a time you handled a conflict', or 'Describe a project you are proud of'. Always focus on your role and the positive outcome.

Technical interviews often cover: Data Structures (Arrays, Linked Lists, Trees), Algorithms (Sorting, Searching), System Design, and specific language concepts like 'What is a decorator in Python?' or 'Difference between Let and Var'.
Be ready to discuss O(n) notation, memory management, and how to optimize your code. Practice on platforms like LeetCode or HackerRank to stay sharp.
Famous monuments include the Taj Mahal (Agra, India), Eiffel Tower (Paris, France), Statue of Liberty (New York, USA), Great Wall of China, and Colosseum (Rome, Italy).
Monuments are symbols of history. For example, the Pyramids of Giza in Egypt are ancient wonders, while Burj Khalifa in Dubai is a modern architectural marvel.
The Taj Mahal is located in Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is an ivory-white marble mausoleum on the south bank of the Yamuna river.
The Eiffel Tower is located in Paris, France, on the Champ de Mars. It is one of the most visited paid monuments in the world.

I'm sorry you have a fever. Care tips: 1. Rest completely. 2. Drink plenty of fluids (water, electrolytes). 3. Keep the room cool. 4. Use a damp cloth on the forehead.

Common Medication: Paracetamol (Crocin/Dolo) is often used for fever relief.

⚠️ DISCLAIMER: I am an AI, not a doctor. Please consult a healthcare professional before taking any medication or if the fever persists.

For a headache, try resting in a dark, quiet room, staying hydrated, and avoiding screen time. Common Medication: Aspirin, Ibuprofen, or Paracetamol are frequently used.

⚠️ DISCLAIMER: I am an AI assistant. Please seek professional medical advice if the pain is severe or frequent.

For cold and cough: 1. Gargle with warm salt water. 2. Steam inhalation. 3. Drink ginger or honey tea. 4. Stay warm.
Common syrups like Benadryl or tablets like Cetirizine are often used for symptoms.

⚠️ DISCLAIMER: Please consult a physician for a proper diagnosis and prescription.

To maintain good health: 1. Eat a balanced diet (fruits, veggies, proteins). 2. Exercise daily. 3. Get 7-8 hours of sleep. 4. Wash hands frequently. 5. Stay hydrated. Prevention is always better than cure!
